'''Sebolto's Palace''' was an underworld [[palace]] located on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. It was home to the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Sebolto]].

The complex itself is a huge structure with outposts that stretched far out into the surrounding jungle and even below it. Guards would patrol each outpost with [[Nexu/Legends|Nexu]]. Below the main palace lay a huge [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]] factory, a place that many of Sebolto's enemies and ironically himself would end up.

[[File:SeboltosThroneRoom.png|thumb|left|180px|Sebolto's throne room]]
There was an elaborate series of tunnels running under and around the palace in case of attack or a raid all, of which were heavily patrolled. The death stick factory was maintained by [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]], most of whom had criminal records with no where else to turn, allowing [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] to collect many bounties during his trip through the palace.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''
